title: Gemma Playground: AI Edge Gallery
summary: Ian Ballantyne demonstrates Gemma running locally on Pixel 10 Pro via the Google AI Edge Gallery app. The demo shows image understanding, audio transcription, agent routing to phone apps, and multimodal tasks all without connectivity, with capabilities like JSON schema extraction and plant identification.
writeup: Ian Ballantyne demonstrates Gemma running locally on a Pixel 10 Pro through the Google AI Edge Gallery app, with all tasks executed without connectivity. The demo covers image understanding, audio transcription, agent routing to phone apps, and multimodal work including JSON schema extraction and plant identification. It shows that on-device inference can handle multimodal and agent orchestration tasks offline, removing the dependency on network access.
